# Pull request

## Summary

Describe the observable change, the user-facing boundary, and any compatibility impact.

## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests or checks cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Documentation and relative links are updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No credentials, managed values, private paths, or machine-specific data are included.
- [ ] The Conventional Commit title and version impact are intentional.

## Review notes

Call out migration steps, security-sensitive behavior, or follow-up work that is required for reviewers to understand the change.
